input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

answers.text: The video begins on an indoor trading floor with workers in maroon vests, then cuts to a busy outdoor street featuring yellow buses and pedestrians carrying loads. A man in a red polo and another in a light blue shirt walk prominently. Later, a man in an orange sleeveless shirt appears, followed by a man in a grey t-shirt walking forward. The news ticker updates from insurance sector news to sports headlines about Mourinho and Terry as the street scenes continue with various pedestrians moving through the frame.

The video transitions to a slow zoom-out of the white AIICO building, revealing horizontal window bands and a vertical glass corner. Green trees appear in the lower left foreground as the view widens. A ladder leaning against the lower right facade becomes visible near the ground. Throughout this sequence, the blue news banner regarding the insurance industry target remains static, while the red sports ticker updates to display headlines about Khan opting to fight Cotto.

The video cuts to an indoor setting where a woman in a green headwrap and matching patterned top speaks at a podium with a headset. Behind her, a backdrop displays partial text reading "INSURAN" and "SUMMIT." The scene then shifts to a man in a dark suit and pink striped shirt speaking at a similar podium with a "NATIONAL INSURANCE SUMMIT" banner. Finally, the view changes to men seated at a conference table, including one in a grey suit with a green lanyard, with water bottles visible.

answers.text: The video begins on an indoor trading floor with workers in maroon vests, then cuts to a busy outdoor street featuring yellow buses and pedestrians carrying loads. The news ticker updates from insurance sector news to sports headlines about Mourinho and Terry as the street scenes continue with various pedestrians moving through the frame.

The video transitions to a slow zoom-out of the white AIICO building, revealing horizontal window bands and a vertical glass corner. Green trees appear in the lower left foreground as the view widens. A ladder leaning against the lower right facade becomes visible near the ground. Throughout this sequence, the blue news banner regarding the insurance industry target remains static, while the red sports ticker updates to display headlines about Khan opting to fight Cotto.

The video cuts to an indoor setting where a woman in a green headwrap and matching patterned top speaks at a podium with a headset. Behind her, a backdrop displays partial text reading "INSURAN" and "SUMMIT." The scene then shifts to a man in a dark suit and pink striped shirt speaking at a similar podium with a "NATIONAL INSURANCE SUMMIT" banner. Finally, the view changes to men seated at a conference table, including one in a grey suit with a green lanyard, with water bottles visible.

The video cuts to a male anchor in a studio wearing glasses, a dark suit, and a red tie. He speaks while holding a blue pen against a blue digital backdrop featuring financial data. Lower third graphics identify him as Chukwuma Anyanwu, a Financial Analyst, while the red ticker updates to list mobile device compatibility. Finally, the scene shifts to an exterior shot of a white sign displaying "AIICO INSURANCE" and "AMERICAN INTERNATIONAL" above a blue pillar structure.

queries.question: Describe the sequence of scenes and key figures shown in the video from start to finish.

answers.text: The video begins on an indoor trading floor with workers in maroon vests, then cuts to a busy outdoor street featuring yellow buses and pedestrians carrying loads. A man in a red polo and another in a light blue shirt walk prominently. Later, a man in an orange sleeveless shirt appears, followed by a man in a grey t-shirt walking forward. The news ticker updates from insurance sector news to sports headlines about Mourinho and Terry as the street scenes continue with various pedestrians moving through the frame.

The video transitions to a slow zoom-out of the white AIICO building, revealing horizontal window bands and a vertical glass corner. Green trees appear in the lower left foreground as the view widens. A ladder leaning against the lower right facade becomes visible near the ground. Throughout this sequence, the blue news banner regarding the insurance industry target remains static, while the red sports ticker updates to display headlines about Khan opting to fight Cotto.

The video cuts to an indoor setting where a woman in a green headwrap and matching patterned top speaks at a podium with a headset. Behind her, a backdrop displays partial text reading "INSURAN" and "SUMMIT." The scene then shifts to a man in a dark suit and pink striped shirt speaking at a similar podium with a "NATIONAL INSURANCE SUMMIT" banner. Finally, the view changes to men seated at a conference table, including one in a grey suit with a green lanyard, with water bottles visible.

The video cuts to a male anchor in a studio wearing glasses, a dark suit, and a red tie. He speaks while holding a blue pen against a blue digital backdrop featuring financial data. Lower third graphics identify him as Chukwuma Anyanwu, a Financial Analyst, while the red ticker updates to list mobile device compatibility. Finally, the scene shifts to an exterior shot of a white sign displaying "AIICO INSURANCE" and "AMERICAN INTERNATIONAL" above a blue pillar structure.

The news ticker updates from insurance sector news to sports headlines about Mourinho and Terry as the street scenes continue with various pedestrians moving through the frame.

The video transitions to a slow zoom-out of the white AIICO building, revealing horizontal window bands and a vertical glass corner. Green trees appear in the lower left foreground as the view widens. A ladder leaning against the lower right facade becomes visible near the ground. Throughout this sequence, the blue news banner regarding the insurance industry target remains static, while the red sports ticker updates to display headlines about Khan opting to fight Cotto.

The video cuts to an indoor setting where a woman in a green headwrap and matching patterned top speaks at a podium with a headset. Behind her, a backdrop displays partial text reading "INSURAN" and "SUMMIT." The scene then shifts to a man in a dark suit and pink striped shirt speaking at a similar podium with a "NATIONAL INSURANCE SUMMIT" banner. Finally, the view changes to men seated at a conference table, including one in a grey suit with a green lanyard, with water bottles visible.

The video cuts to a male anchor in a studio wearing glasses, a dark suit, and a red tie. He speaks while holding a blue pen against a blue digital backdrop featuring financial data. Lower third graphics identify him as Chukwuma Anyanwu, a Financial Analyst, while the red ticker updates to list mobile device compatibility. Finally, the scene shifts to an exterior shot of a white sign displaying "AIICO INSURANCE" and "AMERICAN INTERNATIONAL" above a blue pillar structure.

queries.question: Describe the sequence of scenes and key figures shown in the video from start to finish.

answers.text: The video begins on an indoor trading floor with workers in maroon vests, then cuts to a busy outdoor street featuring yellow buses and pedestrians carrying loads. A man in a red polo and another in a light blue shirt walk prominently. Later, a man in an orange sleeveless shirt appears, followed by a man in a grey t-shirt walking forward. The news ticker updates from insurance sector news to sports headlines about Mourinho and Terry as the street scenes continue with various pedestrians moving through the frame.

The video transitions to a slow zoom-out of the white AIICO building, revealing horizontal window bands and a vertical glass corner. Green trees appear in the lower left foreground as the view widens. A ladder leaning against the lower right facade becomes visible near the ground. Throughout this sequence, the blue news banner regarding the insurance industry target remains static, while the red sports ticker updates to display headlines about Khan opting to fight Cotto.

The video cuts to an indoor setting where a woman in a green headwrap and matching patterned top speaks at a podium with a headset. Behind her, a backdrop displays partial text reading "INSURAN" and "SUMMIT." The scene then shifts to a man in a dark suit and pink striped shirt speaking at a similar podium with a "NATIONAL INSURANCE SUMMIT" banner. Finally, the view changes to men seated at a conference table, including one in a grey suit with a green lanyard, with water bottles visible.

The video cuts to a male anchor in a studio wearing glasses, a dark suit, and a red tie. He speaks while holding a blue pen against a blue digital backdrop featuring financial data. Lower third graphics identify him as Chukwuma Anyanwu, a Financial Analyst, while the red ticker updates to list mobile device compatibility. Finally, the scene shifts to an exterior shot of a white sign displaying "AIICO INSURANCE" and "AMERICAN INTERNATIONAL" above a blue pillar structure.

You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

queries.question: Describe the sequence of scenes and key figures shown in the video from start to finish.

answers.text: The video begins on an indoor trading floor with workers in maroon vests, then cuts to a busy outdoor street featuring yellow buses and pedestrians carrying loads. A man in a red polo and another in a light blue shirt walk prominently. Later, a man in an orange sleeveless shirt appears, followed by a man in a grey t-shirt walking forward. The news ticker updates from insurance sector news to sports headlines about Mourinho and Terry as the street scenes continue with various pedestrians moving through the frame.

The video transitions to a slow zoom-out of the white AIICO building, revealing horizontal window bands and a vertical glass corner. Green trees appear in the lower left foreground as the view widens. A ladder leaning against the lower right facade becomes visible near the ground. Throughout this sequence, the blue news banner regarding the insurance industry target remains static, while the red sports ticker updates to display headlines about Khan opting to fight Cotto.

The video cuts to an indoor setting where a woman in a green headwrap and matching patterned top speaks at a podium with a headset. Behind her, a backdrop displays partial text reading "INSURAN" and "SUMMIT." The scene then shifts to a man in a dark suit and pink striped shirt speaking at a similar podium with a "NATIONAL INSURANCE SUMMIT" banner. Finally, the view changes to men seated at a conference table, including one in a grey suit with a green lanyard, with water bottles visible.

The video cuts to a male anchor in a studio wearing glasses, a dark suit, and a red tie. He speaks while holding a blue pen against a blue digital backdrop featuring financial data. Lower third graphics identify him as Chukwuma Anyanwu, a Financial Analyst, while the red ticker updates to list mobile device compatibility. Finally, the scene shifts to an exterior shot of a white sign displaying "AIICO INSURANCE" and "AMERICAN INTERNATIONAL" above a blue pillar structure.

A man in a red polo and another in a light blue shirt walk prominently. Later, a man in an orange sleeveless shirt appears, followed by a man in a grey t-shirt walking forward. The news ticker updates from insurance sector news to sports headlines about Mourinho and Terry as the street scenes continue with various pedestrians moving through the frame.

The video transitions to a slow zoom-out of the white AIICO building, revealing horizontal window bands and a vertical glass corner. Green trees appear in the lower left foreground as the view widens. A ladder leaning against the lower right facade becomes visible near the ground. Throughout this sequence, the blue news banner regarding the insurance industry target remains static, while the red sports ticker updates to display headlines about Khan opting to fight Cotto.

The video cuts to an indoor setting where a woman in a green headwrap and matching patterned top speaks at a podium with a headset. Behind her, a backdrop displays partial text reading "INSURAN" and "SUMMIT." The scene then shifts to a man in a dark suit and pink striped shirt speaking at a similar podium with a "NATIONAL INSURANCE SUMMIT" banner. Finally, the view changes to men seated at a conference table, including one in a grey suit with a green lanyard, with water bottles visible.

The video cuts to a male anchor in a studio wearing glasses, a dark suit, and a red tie. He speaks while holding a blue pen against a blue digital backdrop featuring financial data. Lower third graphics identify him as Chukwuma Anyanwu, a Financial Analyst, while the red ticker updates to list mobile device compatibility. Finally, the scene shifts to an exterior shot of a white sign displaying "AIICO INSURANCE" and "AMERICAN INTERNATIONAL" above a blue pillar structure.

samples.output: <think>The man wearing black-rimmed glasses and a red patterned tie remains seated against the blue background featuring financial data. He continues to speak, shifting his gaze slightly while maintaining his posture. The news banners at the bottom regarding the insurance industry and Confab report implementation remain unchanged on the screen.</think><answer></answer>

The news ticker updates from insurance sector news to sports headlines about Mourinho and Terry as the street scenes continue with various pedestrians moving through the frame.

The video transitions to a slow zoom-out of the white AIICO building, revealing horizontal window bands and a vertical glass corner. Green trees appear in the lower left foreground as the view widens. A ladder leaning against the lower right facade becomes visible near the ground. Throughout this sequence, the blue news banner regarding the insurance industry target remains static, while the red sports ticker updates to display headlines about Khan opting to fight Cotto.

The video cuts to an indoor setting where a woman in a green headwrap and matching patterned top speaks at a podium with a headset. Behind her, a backdrop displays partial text reading "INSURAN" and "SUMMIT." The scene then shifts to a man in a dark suit and pink striped shirt speaking at a similar podium with a "NATIONAL INSURANCE SUMMIT" banner. Finally, the view changes to men seated at a conference table, including one in a grey suit with a green lanyard, with water bottles visible.

The video cuts to a male anchor in a studio wearing glasses, a dark suit, and a red tie. He speaks while holding a blue pen against a blue digital backdrop featuring financial data. Lower third graphics identify him as Chukwuma Anyanwu, a Financial Analyst, while the red ticker updates to list mobile device compatibility. Finally, the scene shifts to an exterior shot of a white sign displaying "AIICO INSURANCE" and "AMERICAN INTERNATIONAL" above a blue pillar structure.

The video concludes with exterior shots of the AIICO Insurance building. A white sign displaying "AIICO INSURANCE" and "AMERICAN INTERNATIONAL" appears above a blue pillar. The view widens to show the large white office structure with horizontal window bands and parked vehicles. A man in a white shirt walks across the lot while a white sedan drives from left to right in the foreground, as news banners regarding industry recapitalization remain static.

queries.question: Given what is visible so far, could a passerby identify the company operating this building? A. Yes — large 'AIICO INSURANCE' text is on the outdoor sign B. No — no outdoor sign is visible C. No — no readable text is visible D. No — no building facade is visible

answers.text: A

queries.question: Describe the sequence of scenes and key figures shown in the video from start to finish.

answers.text: The video begins on an indoor trading floor with workers in maroon vests, then cuts to a busy outdoor street featuring yellow buses and pedestrians carrying loads. A man in a red polo and another in a light blue shirt walk prominently. Later, a man in an orange sleeveless shirt appears, followed by a man in a grey t-shirt walking forward. The news ticker updates from insurance sector news to sports headlines about Mourinho and Terry as the street scenes continue with various pedestrians moving through the frame.

The video transitions to a slow zoom-out of the white AIICO building, revealing horizontal window bands and a vertical glass corner. Green trees appear in the lower left foreground as the view widens. A ladder leaning against the lower right facade becomes visible near the ground. Throughout this sequence, the blue news banner regarding the insurance industry target remains static, while the red sports ticker updates to display headlines about Khan opting to fight Cotto.

The video cuts to an indoor setting where a woman in a green headwrap and matching patterned top speaks at a podium with a headset. Behind her, a backdrop displays partial text reading "INSURAN" and "SUMMIT." The scene then shifts to a man in a dark suit and pink striped shirt speaking at a similar podium with a "NATIONAL INSURANCE SUMMIT" banner. Finally, the view changes to men seated at a conference table, including one in a grey suit with a green lanyard, with water bottles visible.

The video cuts to a male anchor in a studio wearing glasses, a dark suit, and a red tie. He speaks while holding a blue pen against a blue digital backdrop featuring financial data. Lower third graphics identify him as Chukwuma Anyanwu, a Financial Analyst, while the red ticker updates to list mobile device compatibility. Finally, the scene shifts to an exterior shot of a white sign displaying "AIICO INSURANCE" and "AMERICAN INTERNATIONAL" above a blue pillar structure.

The video concludes with exterior shots of the AIICO Insurance building. A white sign displaying "AIICO INSURANCE" and "AMERICAN INTERNATIONAL" appears above a blue pillar. The view widens to show the large white office structure with horizontal window bands and parked vehicles. A man in a white shirt walks across the lot while a white sedan drives from left to right in the foreground, as news banners regarding industry recapitalization remain static.
